title: eragrostis infirma
intro: Eragrostis infirma is a type of grass native to Australia, commonly known as a low-growing or weak love grass. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eragrostis infirma include treating fever, wounds, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as providing relief from gastrointestinal issues and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Eragrostis infirma is often made into a tea, decoction, or infusion, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
